zh.Llanycil, Merionethshire, Wales: 威爾士梅利奧爾利安希爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Madog Fychan William Hywel於大約1387年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾時，他的父親Hywel Fychan ap Hywel75歲，母親Alys verch Llewelyn87歲。他和Mrs. Ieuan Llwyd ap Hywel至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。

zh-hans.Llanycil, Merionethshire, Wales: 威尔士梅利奧爾利安希爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Madog Fychan William Hywel于大约1387年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾时，他的父亲Hywel Fychan ap Hywel75岁，母亲Alys verch Llewelyn87岁。他和Mrs. Ieuan Llwyd ap Hywel至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

variants.name: Memoli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Ciro, Francesco, Luciano, Natale, Nino.
Italian:
patronymic or plural form of a pet form of thepersonal name Guglielmo, Italian form of William .

variants.name: McElligott
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brigid, Brendan, Seamus.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uileagóid, a patronymic from a pet form of the Gaelic form of the personal name William .

variants.name: McWilliam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scottish Iain, Morag.

Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uilleim, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of William , also Anglicized as Williamson in Scotland. The name is thought to be mainly Scottish in Ulster, though there has been some confusion with McQuillan in County Down. In Connacht, McWilliam was a branch of Burke .

variants.name: Wilcock
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Wilcoc, a pet form of William (composed of the elements Will 1 + the hypocoristic suffix -cok; see Cocke ).

variants.name: McWilliams
meanings: Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uilleim, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of William , with excrescent English -s. In Ireland it sometimes represents a partial Gaelicization of Welsh Williams .

variants.name: Lemmo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Donato, Gino.
Italian (southern): from the personal name Lemmo, a pet form of Guglielmo, an equivalent of William . Compare Lembo .

variants.name: Wilk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Mariusz, Stanislaw, Tadeusz, Zygmunt, Andrzej, Bogdan, Boguslaw, Casimir, Krzysztof, Stanislawa, Boleslaw, Darek.

Polish: from the vocabulary word wilk ‘wolf’, probably applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble a wolf or connected with wolves in some way. Alternatively, from an Old Slavic personal name based on vlъkъ ‘wolf’.
English (Staffordshire): from Middle English Wilke, a pet form of William and probably a shortening of Wilkin . The usage was very likely Flemish in origin.

variants.name: Wilkin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wilkin, a pet form of William introduced to England and Scotland by Flemings and Picards after the Norman Conquest.
North German: variant of   Wilken  .

variants.name: Gillam
meanings: English: variant of   Gilliam  .
Welsh: Anglicized form of   Gwilliam  .

variants.name: Lembo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Carmelo, Domenic, Pietro, Alfio, Amelio, Antonio, Biagio, Dante, Giovani, Giovanni.
Italian (southern): from a hypercorrected form of Lemmo, a pet form of Guglièlmo, an equivalent of William .

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Madog Fychan William Hywel was born about 1387, in Breconshire, Wales, his father, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, was 75 and his mother, Alys verch Llewelyn, was 87. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Mrs. Ieuan Llwyd ap Hywel.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Madog Fychan William Hywel est né environ 1387, à Breconshire, Galles, son père, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, avait 75 ans et sa mère, Alys verch Llewelyn, avait 87 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Mrs. Ieuan Llwyd ap Hywel.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Madog Fychan William Hywel um 1387 in Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel Fychan ap Hywel 75 und seine Mutter Alys verch Llewelyn 87. Er hatte mit Mrs. Ieuan Llwyd ap Hywel mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

ht.of Nannau,Llanfachreth,Merionethshire,Wa: Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Madog Fychan William Hywel è nato il circa 1387 nel Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, aveva 75 anni e il suo madre, Alys verch Llewelyn, aveva 87 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Mrs. Ieuan Llwyd ap Hywel.

ja.Breconshire, Wales: ウェールズブレコンシュアイア
ja.of Nannau,Llanfachreth,Merionethshire,Wa: イギリスウェールズメリオンエスシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Lord Madog Fychan William Hywelが約1387年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hywel Fychan ap Hywelは75歳，母Alys verch Llewelynは87歳であった。彼はMrs. Ieuan Llwyd ap Hywelとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Madog Fychan William Hywel(이)가 대략 1387년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel Fychan ap Hywel(은)는 75세였고, 그의 어머니 Alys verch Llewelyn(은)는 87세였다. 그는 Mrs. Ieuan Llwyd ap Hywel(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

mg.of Nannau,Llanfachreth,Merionethshire,Wa: Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

mn.of Nannau,Llanfachreth,Merionethshire,Wa: Sir Feirionnydd, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Madog Fychan William Hywel nasceu aproximadamente 1387, em Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, tinha 75 anos e sua mãe, Alys verch Llewelyn, tinha 87 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Mrs. Ieuan Llwyd ap Hywel.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Madog Fychan William Hywel родился около 1387 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Hywel Fychan ap Hywel было 75 лет, а матери, которую звали Alys verch Llewelyn, 87. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Mrs. Ieuan Llwyd ap Hywel.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Madog Fychan William Hywel nació aproximadamente 1387, en Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, tenía 75 años y su mamá, Alys verch Llewelyn, tenía 87 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Mrs. Ieuan Llwyd ap Hywel.
